content.en:
"Okay, the two rewards have been given to you, you can leave!"

Yuntan Tianjun Road.

"Good!"

Ye Tianying said.

But at this moment, Yuntan Tianjun said again: "Let me remind you again, if you are facing the moment of becoming a transcendent in the future, don't rush to impact the realm of transcendentals, and try to accumulate as much as possible." In addition, there should be a secret to the abyss of destruction, and the ontology was faced with the moment when the universe would enter the moment of the great destruction of the universe in a short time, and it was too eager to become a transcendent person, and it was eager to fight against the origin of the universe, in fact, it also wanted to prevent the great collapse of the universe, but unfortunately it failed. Therefore, he did not dare to enter the deepest part of the Abyss of Destruction with his seriously injured body, and only came to this middle area. So, if you have the chance, you can check it out!"

"If I become a transcendent, I'm going to see it!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Alright, you go!"

Yuntan Tianjun waved his hand, and Ye Tian left from the place of inheritance.

......

After coming out of the Land of Inheritance, Ye Tian left here.

This place has been discovered and spread, and there must be strong people of all races coming here from time to time.

Although he was not afraid of those strong people of all races, he did not want to waste time.

He was now eager to cultivate the Tiangang Battle Technique and refine that trace of the Universe Origin.

The Universe Origin Fragment couldn't be taken out of here, otherwise it would be taken back by the Universe Origin, and he didn't want to waste such a piece of treasure.

Therefore, he now wants to find a quiet place to cultivate silently.

As for everything else, it doesn't matter at the moment.

Soon, Ye Tian found a desolate mountain range, entered it, opened a cave, and practiced retreat in it.

In the cave.

Ye Tian recalled the content of the first form of Tiangang's battle method in his mind, and then began to silently comprehend.

"It's hard!"

Ye Tian frowned.

The first form alone is very complicated, and it is difficult to practice in a short period of time, and it takes a long time to be able to practice the first form of this Tiangang battle method.

"That's right, the Tiangang Combat Technique is so magical, if it is so easy to practice, it would be strange! After all, this kind of secret technique, once the cultivation achievement is one's own, there is no need to cultivate it again, and although the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique is more advanced, it is only a method of cultivation, not a method of fighting, so it is naturally easy to cultivate!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

He has a lot of time, but he doesn't have that much time in this world, at most a few hundred years, he must leave this world, otherwise the power of the universe origin will withdraw from the Abyss of Destruction, and those destructive creatures will reoccupy the middle region of the Abyss of Destruction.

Those who destroy creatures cannot enter this world, but they can stay outside the world, and once they leave, they must withstand the attacks of those destroying creatures.

Ye Tian's strength was okay against weaker destructive creatures, but if he touched a dominant-level destructive creature, he would definitely die.

"Let's refine that trace of the universe origin first, maybe after refining, it will be many times easier for me to comprehend the first form of Tiangang's battle method!" Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he took out the Universe Origin Fragment and began to absorb and refine it.

Rumble!!!!

The aura of the cosmic origin began to pour into Ye Tian's body from the fragments.

In just an instant, Ye Tian felt the countless rules within the origin of the universe, and even the rules of time and space were presented in front of Ye Tian, making Ye Tian understand more and more about time and space.

Absorbing the fragments of the origin of the universe is a complete predatory comprehension of countless rules, as if it is devouring these rules, although it may not be understood immediately, but it can absorb some, so that its own background will skyrocket in an instant.

With the refining of the Universe Origin Fragment, the law aura on Ye Tian's body became stronger and stronger, and even the Origin of the Sword in his body was growing rapidly, and the rules of the Chaos Ancient Realm were becoming more and more perfect.

The Chaos Ancient Realm has grown to the current limit, and there is no way to continue to expand without breaking through the cultivation, but the space can continue to stabilize, and the entire Chaos Ancient Realm seems to have ushered in a new transformation.

Of course, this is only a side effect.

Ye Tian's real benefits are far more than that, but he has a better understanding of the rules in the universe, as if he has understood countless years.

Prior to this, although Ye Tian's attainment in the law was very deep, it was difficult to compare with those strong people who had lived for a long time, such as Allah Immortal, and the other party's attainment in the law and the avenue surpassed Ye Tian.

And now, Ye Tian has refined the Universe Origin Fragment, and instantly surpassed the Immortal Allah, and the two are no longer of the same grade.

Time passed little by little, and about a year had passed, and Ye Tian had finally completely refined this piece of cosmic origin fragment.

When he opened his eyes, Ye Tian's eyes were full of joy.

He felt the difference in himself, and his whole person seemed to be sublimated.

"Try the Tiangang Battle Method again!"

Ye Tian came to his senses again.

With this understanding, Ye Tian found that some obscure things were originally understood, but now he can understand them at a glance, and he can even deduce other content.

"In a thousand years, you can definitely practice the first form of Tiangang's battle method!"

Ye Tian is very confident.

And for him, a thousand years is only a year, after all, he can speed up time by 1,000 times.

Time accelerated to open, and Ye Tian began to cultivate the Tiangang Battle Method in a thousand-fold time acceleration.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed in the outside world.

this day.

Ye Tian had finished his cultivation, and he had successfully practiced the first form of the Tiangang Battle Method.

Immediately, he performed the first form of the Tiangang Battle Method, and an astonishing Tiangang Qi erupted from his body.

Ye Tian casually cast a move, and burst out with terrifying destructive power.

After Ye Tian's test, he found that his attack had reached a terrifying six times the increase in the first form of Tiangang's battle method.

Not only has the attack power reached six times, but the defense power and the degree of reaction have been expanded by six times, which can be said to be a six-fold increase overall.

Six times doesn't seem like much, but Ye Tian's combat power is almost difficult to continue to improve, but Tiangang's battle method has broken the limit and increased by six times again, which is very exaggerated!

Moreover, this is only the first form of Tiangang's battle method, and there are eight styles behind.

Once he has practiced all of the Tiangang Combat Technique Nine Forms, Ye Tian's combat power will reach a terrifying level, reaching a point that Ye Tian himself can't guess.

Immediately.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend the Supreme Sword Dao Peerless Technique, the Chaos True Technique, and the Chaos Dao, and his progress was very fast.

Originally, Ye Tian only condensed the phantom of the Chaos Sea Law Phase, but now after a period of enlightenment, Ye Tian finally condensed the Chaos Sea Law Phase of the real entity.

At this point, Ye Tian's Chaos Avenue has officially stepped into the realm of the Law Phase!
